findings.summary: decision_reference validation accepts bare GitHub PR/issue URLs instead of requiring the concrete issue-comment or pull-request-review URL that anchors the human decision.

checks_reviewed.evidence: Read-only review showed tracked changes only in docs/plans/work-units/README.md, scripts/lib/work-unit-machine.mjs, scripts/validate-work-units.mjs, team-doc/mobile-app-dev-team/06-gates-and-evidence.md, and team-doc/mobile-app-dev-team/10-github-artifact-workflow.md.
Read-only review found only PR2 review evidence and human-gate work-unit fixtures as untracked files.
Ran during review; exit 0 with output: Validated work-unit status fixtures.
Ran during review; exit 0 with output: Validated work-unit status artifacts.
Ran during review; exit 0 with output: Validated current team-doc managed docs.
Ran during review; exit 0 with no whitespace errors.
Checkpoint records exit 0 and runtime validation output at .evidence/reviews/pr2-human-gate-envelope-implementation-checkpoint-20260610.md:69-77.
Checkpoint records exit 0, including test:runtime and pnpm turbo run lint test, at .evidence/reviews/pr2-human-gate-envelope-implementation-checkpoint-20260610.md:79-87.
No mobile UI/runtime paths changed; AGENTS.md requires mobile-mcp visual QA only for mobile UI/runtime changes with an available simulator/device.
PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md and REPO_OPERATIONS.md define live Confluence publish/update as external human-gated work; checkpoint records no live publish was performed.

residual_risks: Offline validation cannot cryptographically prove the GitHub author identity; the plan already treats that as policy-level anchoring until a future online verification path exists.
The currently passing self-test does not include an invalid fixture for a bare PR or issue URL decision_reference, so the identified validator gap can regress unnoticed until covered.
Live Confluence publication and external platform state remain outside PR2 local validation.
